title: Making Plans Casually
description: 今天练习自然安排时间和计划：不僵硬，也不显得太随便。

items.cn: 表示时间、地点或方案都可以配合。比 “Anything is OK” 更自然。
examples: I'm flexible, so just send me whatever time works for you.
I'm flexible on location, but somewhere quiet would be nice.
dialogue: Would Tuesday or Wednesday be better?
I'm flexible. Pick whatever works for your schedule.
